creator: Heinz-Guenter.Siebert@t-online.de
text:
After installation trying to do a kernel configuration.
make depend starting the work.
After some time I  get message 
mkdep: compile failed - ../../pci/if_de.c #include expects "FILENAME" of <FILENAME>
As I see in if_de.c there is a 
#include DEVAR_INCLUDE which should have been set before with 

#define	DEVAR_INCLUDE	"pci/if_devar.h"
